decision: Completed provider adapter kernel activation proposal.
summary: Drafted a bounded provider adapter kernel activation proposal, added Gate F provider adapter activation review, and queued the first Phase 5 local/stub-backed provider adapter kernel task behind Gate F.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to Gate F review. Do not start Phase 5 implementation until Gate F confirms the proposal forbids real paid provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, yellow auto-approval, and production side effects.
notes: Proposal recommends promote, but implementation remains gated by Gate F.
First implementation slice is local/API-compatible stub only with expected_cost_usd 0.0.
